steps.title: Isolate y by undoing the subtraction
steps.content: The equation $y - 57 = px$ has $y$ on the left side with 57 subtracted from it. To isolate $y$, we need to undo this subtraction by adding 57 to both sides of the equation.

steps.title: Solve for y
steps.content:
Adding 57 to both sides:
$$y - 57 + 57 = px + 57$$
Simplifying:
$$y = px + 57$$
That matches choice B — B is correct.
